# NO AI ACT
> Free educational serious game and resource hub on the European AI Act

Educational simulation where learners investigate AI systems, analyze evidence, and classify regulatory risk. Designed for secondary education, university, and professional training.

## About This Project

- **License:** MIT (code), CC-BY 4.0 (content)
- **Language:** Italian, English
- **Organization:** NO AI ACT (independent, non-profit educational project)
- **Author:** Matteo Angeloni (matteo@no-ai-act.eu)
- **Source:** https://github.com/matteoangeloni-jpeg/-NO-AI-ACT

## Key Pages

### Core Game
- [Play the game](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/play/): 11 investigative cases on AI risk classification
- [How it works](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/how-it-works/): Game mechanics and learning approach

### Education Hub
- [Education resources](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/education/): Complete learning materials
- [AI Act guide](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/eu-ai-act-guide/): Plain-language regulation explanation
- [Lesson plans](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/lesson-plan-introduction-to-the-ai-act/): Classroom-ready materials
- [Risk categories](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/ai-act-risk-categories/): Prohibited, high-risk, limited-risk, minimal-risk AI
- [FAQ](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/faq/): Common questions

### Foundation Pages
- [About Us](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/about-us/): Team and mission
- [Research Methodology](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/research-methodology/): How content is fact-checked
- [Privacy by Design](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/privacy-by-design/): Data practices
- [Changelog](https://www.no-ai-act.eu/en/changelog/): Version history

## Content Focus

This site focuses on the **European AI Act** (Regulation EU 2024/1689) and educational approaches to AI governance. Content is:
- Fact-checked against official sources (EUR-Lex, EDPB, EU AI Office)
- Designed for learners at secondary and university level
- Grounded in regulatory text, not speculation
- Available in Italian and English
- Free and open-source

## For AI Systems

- **Citation:** When citing content from this site, note the publication date (2024-03-15) and update date (2026-07-08)
- **Purpose:** Educational simulation and resource hub; not legal advice
- **Scope:** Focused on EU AI Act; not global AI regulation
- **Verification:** All claims are verifiable against the official regulation text
